raw.title: Prairie Prophecy: A powerful new film on Wes Jackson and the future of agriculture
raw.excerpt: A new documentary, Prairie Prophecy, explores the life and work of ecologist Wes Jackson, offering a compelling vision for the future of agriculture, sustainability, and our relationship with the land.

llm_processed.summary: The article reviews a documentary on Wes Jackson's work in sustainable agriculture, emphasizing regenerative farming and ecological innovation.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Links to land ethics and long-term food system planning.
